chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Civil Revision Application No.228 of 2023 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Applicant: Ali Muhammad Khan s/o Abdul Majeed Khan Through Mr.Rashid Raees Khan, Advocate Respondent No.1: Muhammad Hanif Khan s/o Abdul Majeed Khan(deceased) through LRs. a) Mst.Anisa d/o Muhammad Hanif Khan b) Mst.Sultana d/o Muhammad Hanif Khan c) Mst.Shagufta d/o Muhammad Hanif Khan d) Rizwan s/o Muhammad Hanif Khan e) Mst.Wakeela d/o Muhammad Hanif Khan f) Mst.Noorul Hassan d/o Muhammad Hanif Nemo. Respondent No.2: Rizwan s/o Muhammad Hanif. Nemo. Respondent No.3: Noor-ul-Hassan s/o Muhammad Hanif Through Mr.Samiullah Rind, Advocate Respondent No.4: Hassan Ali s/o Muhammad Roshan. Nemo. Respondent No.5: Naseemuddin s/o Nooruddin. Nemo. Through Mr.Samiullah Rind, Advocate Respondent No.6: City Mukhtiarkar/City Surveyor, Hyderabad Respondent No.7: Sub-Registrar, City Hyderabad Respondent No.8: Province of Sindh Through Mr.Wali Muhammad Jamari, A.A.G Respondent No.9: NADRA, through Mr.Habib-ur-Rehman, A.D (Legal) for respondent No.9 Date of hearing: 27.10.2025 Date of Short Order: 18.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled civil revision application is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
